name: N.yr.eve Feast - 1. Broiled Vegetable Medley
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl or cup, combine olive oil, rosemary, and minced garlic. If using dried rosemary, reduce the amount to 1 teaspoon.
2. Preheat the broiler.
3. Cut zucchini into long strips that are 1/2-inch thick. Cut eggplant into rounds that are 1/2-inch thick. Cut onion into rings that are 1/2-inch thick. Cut red pepper into strips that are 1/2-inch thick.
4. Place the vegetables in a single layer on a large baking sheet. Brush with half of the olive oil mixture.
5. Broil, 4 inches from the heat source, for 5 minutes.
6. Turn the vegetables and brush with the remaining olive oil mixture. Broil for an additional 4-6 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
7. Sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Arrange the vegetables on a serving platter with lemon wedges. Tuck lettuce leaves under the vegetables around the platter.
